features: CAVITY PROTECTION: Our Colgate Cool Stripe Toothpaste is specially designed to provide reliable cavity protection, helping your teeth stay strong every day
STRENGTHENS TEETH: This toothpaste is clinically proven to strengthen your teeth, giving you the confidence to show off your smile with pride
FIGHTS CAVITIES: Formulated to fight cavities, helping you maintain excellent oral hygiene and a bright, happy smile
FRESHENS BREATH: Enjoy fresh breath each time you brush so you can feel confident and ready to face the day
CLINICALLY PROVEN: Trust in the clinically proven results of our toothpaste to deliver great results for your mouth
REFRESHING TASTE: Experience the cool, refreshing taste of Colgate Cool Stripe that makes brushing your teeth a delightful part of your daily routine
description: Product Description For a strong smile, choose our Colgate Cool Stripe Toothpaste Pump 100ml. This Colgate toothpaste is clinically proven to strengthen teeth and freshen breath. It fights cavities with its reliable formula, providing cavity protection for your teeth and helping you maintain great oral hygiene. The cool, refreshing taste makes your brushing routine enjoyable and leaves your mouth feeling fresh. Colgate Cool Stripe Toothpaste is perfect for adults, providing complete care for your family. With added fluoride protection, this fluoride toothpaste helps keep your teeth strong. Our toothpaste not only strengthens your teeth but also helps you achieve a bright, white smile. Our Colgate Cool Stripe Toothpaste is perfect for anyone looking to enhance their oral care routine. So, enjoy the benefits of a sparkling smile with our trusted Colgate toothpaste. Ingredients INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sorbitol, Hydrated Silica, Glycerin, Calcium Pyrophosphate, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, PEG-12, Aroma, Cellulose Gum, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, CI 74160. Contains: Sodium Fluoride Total Fluoride content: 1450 ppm Directions Apply a pea-sized amount toothpaste to the brush. Brush your teeth in circular motions for two minutes, making sure to reach all surfaces of your teeth. Rinse water thoroughly. Safety Warning For outdoor use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. Manufacturer Contact Information Colgate-Palmolive, Guildford, GU2 8JZ.Colgate-Palmolive, Guildford, GU2 8JZ. See more
